name: Jeff Teague
subject: Fwd: We're in the News Again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Hello Peter,

Just wanted to make sure you saw this email from last Friday. Can you help us out?

All the best,

Jeff

* * *

Hello, Peter,

The GOP majority in the Tennessee Legislature [made national headlines again](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/HRiWxowyxcTD7ySDwy6kEZfipre9K1X7p0SNuPmzl1o=?rref=collection%2Fcolumn%2Fmargaret-renkl&action=click&contentCollection=opinion&region=stream&module=stream_unit&version=latest&contentPlacement=1&pgtype=collection), this time with their excess of unconstitutional and extreme legislation attacking the autonomy of Tennessee cities and demonizing the least among us.

The [article](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/HRiWxowyxcTD7ySDwy6kEZfipre9K1X7p0SNuPmzl1o=?rref=collection%2Fcolumn%2Fmargaret-renkl&action=click&contentCollection=opinion&region=stream&module=stream_unit&version=latest&contentPlacement=1&pgtype=collection) concludes with a wake-up call for Tennessee and American voters:

The columnist is right.

Instead of hate-fueled political posturing, the majority of Tennesseans want safe communities where every family, through hard work, has the ability to create a bright and dignified economic future, where all children have an equally robust public education that propels them toward achieving their full potential.

You wear these values on your sleeve, and now more than ever, we need your help connecting this message to other Tennesseans.

[_Can you pitch in today to help deliver this unifying message to politically disconnected Tennesseans in communities across our state?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/eRm-qiBZQV5gugesrQ9zsHWrfwfD4xSXG5N0BWoYiQA=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/XVvXIg9UxSyVm3frbY_KBv5H3uP39WfL5XiDyLcEjls=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/ht_9qbcc1SlHH4wYwq04KrZrAHtTIJeOBVR63KWqdfs=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/2Ao-9PsCiqPOG7EZJXnlMIwZIpnHljObtOOE6v6ND1I=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/B25UroI69emUqL0UMUn7kd4B0iVD7RKdv1XCQSvMGTc=/64bBlKoHPZY3JqGumkQ1ooTgq4D53od2sz-lX410Ryw=)
---|---|---|---
Thank you for your continued support.

Trevon
\--
Trevon Sylvester
Communications Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Big news from this weekend
body:
I spent the weekend on the campaign trail in Texas and Georgia, where we
rallied with voters and spoke truths about the challenges we face as a
nation.

In Houston, I announced my plan to raise teacher salaries across this
country with the largest federal investment in teachers in American
history.

No teacher should have to work two or three jobs just to make ends meet.
I’m pledging to you that by the end of my first term as president, we will
close the teacher pay gap in America.

I’m counting on you to join me in this fight right now. In just a few
days, we’ll close the books on the first quarterly FEC fundraising
deadline of our campaign. The numbers we report will demonstrate the
strength of our movement -- and with a primary this competitive, we can’t
afford to fall short.

We’ve set our most ambitious goal yet for this deadline: $750,000 raised
from grassroots contributions. Can you make your first contribution to make
sure we reach this goal?

Our plan to give our teachers an overdue raise is just the beginning. We
are not running a campaign against this president: we are running a
campaign for the future of our country. Together, we’re putting forth a
bold vision for a new America that we can build together.

We’re fighting for an America that will invest in the middle class -- not
the top 1% or corporations. We are fighting for an America where teachers
are paid their worth, and where health care is a human right -- not a
privilege reserved for those who can afford it.

Each of us has a choice to make. Years from now, our children and our
grandchildren will ask us what we did at this inflection point in our
country’s history.

We will be able to tell them about more than how we felt. We will tell
them what we did -- what action we took. Our work starts now.

Our campaign isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Collusion Delusion
body:
"Democrats have been consumed for two years with a flimsy conspiracy theory aimed at delegitimizing a presidential election they lost." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db78229101&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Collusion Delusion**

“Democrats have been consumed for two years with a flimsy conspiracy theory aimed at delegitimizing a presidential election they lost,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes. “But it's over now. An exhaustive federal investigation just put the nail in the coffin of the collusion delusion. If the Democrats and our major media are capable of shame, they will be chastened by this experience.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db433c64e3&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [President Donald J. Trump delivers a statement](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35e1f6a394&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The results of the probe by special counsel Robert Mueller are a tremendous vindication for President Trump and the many millions of Americans who never doubted his innocence. The findings prove, once and for all time, that he won the 2016 election fair and square,” Michael Goodwin writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d54aaa9e3&e=3ee4985eea)_. “No American — not a single one — took the Russian bait. And that includes every member of the Trump campaign.”
---
|
---
| “Press credibility has taken a hit,” University of Tennessee Law Professor Glenn Harlan Reynolds writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5be8c38125&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The news media chose to run with the Russia story, which quickly morphed from ‘hacking’ to the more nebulous ‘collusion,’ quite credulously. They did so because they wanted it to be true, because they hoped it would hurt Trump, whom the press almost universally despises, and because it was good for ratings and clicks.”
---
|
---
| Last week, President Trump “signed an executive order to authorize the denial of federal funds to colleges that suppress student free-speech rights,” F.H. Buckley writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=782677005b&e=3ee4985eea)_. Students who express conservative views on college campuses have been routinely denounced across the country—but no more, says President Trump. “The federal government awards billions to our universities; top schools get a billion apiece. That’s going to stop, he said, if they don’t honor free-speech rights.”
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cebfcca9b9&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Melissa Quinn reports that Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer will go to Beijing this week for continued high-level trade negotiations. “The talks will begin March 28 and are ‘aimed at improving the trade relationship between the United States and China.’”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ae1dd00e0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7a23c99a8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=310430e2df)
---

---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A chance to explain
body:
Here's the the truth:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad)

Sisters and Brothers -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign before our first official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth: when this deadline ends, we are going to report how much money we’ve raised and, just as important, how many individual donations make up that number.
So our job is to report as many donations as we possibly can. And we’re looking for a huge number here. Because every single donation sends a powerful message that our progressive campaign is the best one to beat Trump.
So with time running out, here’s the part where I ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign before our first, official fundraising deadline comes to an end? We’re looking to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. We would not ask if it was not important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190325-1-120&t=26&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad)
This struggle is about taking on the incredibly powerful institutions that control the economic and political life of this country. And what we will prove with our report is that we are the best campaign to defeat them, and to transform this country.
Every donation sends that message. So thank you in advance for adding yours today.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
* * *

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190325-1-120&t=27&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad). If you want to receive less emails, [just tell us here](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

We have an official FEC fundraising deadline coming up and we're trying to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. [**Make a contribution today before the FEC deadline comes to a close.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer-march-deadline&t=30&refcode2=817_150750_m9Z7ad&akid=817%2E150750%2Em9Z7ad)

name: Kirsten (personal)
subject: PHOTOS: Our rally at Trump International yesterday
body:
Standing in front of Trump International Tower, we were brave.
| | |
---
Peter, yesterday was incredible. Standing in front of Trump International Tower, **we were brave**.
We came together to reject Trump's hatred, greed and corruption. And we rallied in support of strong, progressive policies that support every American regardless of who they are or what block they grew up on.
I want to share a few of my favorite photos from the day:

_All I can say is "wow."_

_Future presidents in the crowd._

_My husband, Jonathan, and boys, Theo and Henry._

_Grateful for everyone who joined us yesterday._

This fight is so much bigger than any one election--it's about making a choice about who we are. So will we defend this democracy? Will we reject hate and fear? Will we be brave?
Yes. Yesterday proved it.
If you're with me, chip in, and let's win this fight. We have a very important FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the week. **[Please donate right now to be one of the 65,000 donors we need to guarantee our spot on the Democratic debate stage.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c54/2ae112ef/13b4d884/357d6c0c/3308268132/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2946-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Team Menendez
subject: We haven't heard from you yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

These past two years of Trump's presidency have felt like a roller coaster ride that just won't end.

Through all these ups, downs, twists, and turns, Bob has been working hard to make sure New Jersey families are heard in the Senate.

But in order to get America back on track, Bob needs to know what issues are most important to you.

**[Take a moment to fill out this short survey so Bob can make sure Congress is addressing the issues that matter to you most.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c99/74d715b9/19c37940/1f4bc570/579697968/VEsH/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5929&source=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Take+a+moment+to+fill+out+this+short+sur")**

Thank you,

Team Menendez | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c99/74d715b9/19c37940/1f4bc571/579697968/VEsE/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5929&source=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Bob Menendez**
Sent: Monday, March 18
Subj: I want to hear from you:

Friend,

In my years serving New Jersey, I've spent my time taking on the real issues facing our state and our nation.

But to best represent you, I need to know what issues you consider to be most important. That's why I want to hear from you today.

**[Please take a moment to fill out this short survey and let me know what issues are most important to you.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c99/74d715b9/19c37940/1f4bc572/579697968/VEsF/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5929&source=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Please+take+a+moment+to+fill+out+this+sh")**

I know there is a lot of chaos coming from Washington right now. With the Trump Administration's attacks on our healthcare, our environment, and our immigrant communities, there is so much at stake.

In the Senate, I've been fighting back against the Trump Administration. In the past few weeks, I've introduced legislation to make sure our government combats climate change, declares reproductive rights are human rights, and repeals Trump's cap on state and local income tax deductions.

But there's a lot more work to do, and I don't want to risk missing an opportunity to bring about the changes you most want to see. I can't solve the big problems alone -- I need to know what issues are at the top of your list.

**[Please let me know what issues you want to see Congress address as we move forward -- take a moment to fill out this short survey.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c99/74d715b9/19c37940/1f4bc573/579697968/VEsC/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5929&source=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+Please+let+me+know+what+issues+you+want+")**

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Bob
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c99/74d715b9/19c37940/1f4bc574/579697968/VEsD/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5929&source=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190325_surv_engg_gq_ful_iss_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY")

subject: Climate Change is Impacting Our Neighbors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# Climate Change is Here.

One of the often understated points about climate change is the fact that it will lead to more irregular rain and snowfalls. We are seeing the impacts of this right now with the flooding that is happening across the midwest. You may have seen in the news that many places in Iowa, Kansas, Nebraska, and Minnesota are currently dealing with record flooding due to our extreme snowfall last month. Sadly this flooding is only supposed to continue until May, and we may be seeing more springs like this in the future.

This past weekend a restaurant in Saint Cloud had to be evacuated due to a flash flood that left patrons wading in a few feet of water, and farmers throughout the midwest have lost some of the critical topsoil they need to sustain their livelihoods and our dinner tables. Our community is hurting because of climate change, and we need to act now to ensure that we are prepared for future flooding, and we need to take steps now to prevent things from getting worse.

Between now and 2020 climate change will continue to be a cornerstone of my campaign because I know that working families want to see their children grow up in a safe and clean environment. Will you join me in standing up to prevent climate change and protect our community from extreme weather events?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Climate Change is Here. One of the often understated points about climate change is the fact that it will lead to more irregular rain and snowfalls. We are seeing the impacts of this right now with the flooding that is happening across the midwest. You may have seen in the news that many places in Iowa, Kansas, Nebraska, and Minnesota are currently dealing with record flooding due to our extreme snowfall last month. Sadly this flooding is only supposed to continue until May, and we may be seeing more springs like this in the future. This past weekend a restaurant in Saint Cloud had to be evacuated due to a flash flood that left patrons wading in a few feet of water, and farmers throughout the midwest have lost some of the critical topsoil they need to sustain their livelihoods and our dinner tables. Our community is hurting because of climate change, and we need to act now to ensure that we are prepared for future flooding, and we need to take steps now to prevent things from getting worse. Between now and 2020 climate change will continue to be a cornerstone of my campaign because I know that working families want to see their children grow up in a safe and clean environment. Will you join me in standing up to prevent climate change and protect our community from extreme weather events? so that we can continue to bring the issue of climate change to the top of the discussion in 2020, and bring needed change to Washington as we face this challenge. Your friend, Ian A. Todd | "Donate Today" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS Copyright © 2019 Ian Todd for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
Hi there,
Yesterday, Attorney General William Barr released his summary of Special Counsel Robert Mueller's investigation into Russian interference in the 2016 election.
I won't mince words: **I believe that the American people deserve to see Special Counsel Robert Mueller 's report in full, not a summary curated by President Trump's hand-picked Attorney General.**
[**Will you please sign my petition and call on Attorney General Barr to immediately release the report in its entirety?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2b7/2a380d31/3bba975f/f10108/3420218813/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/release-the-mueller-report?source=e20190325_Mueller_6mo&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
We know that the Special Counsel's investigation has already uncovered substantial evidence of criminal activity -- more than 30 indictments and guilty pleas.
I want to remind the President and his Attorney General that the House voted 420-0 to release the full report, and that the American people deserve full transparency here.
[**This is very important, everyone, so please add your name right now to tell Attorney General Barr to release Robert Mueller 's report.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2b7/2a380d31/3bba975f/f10108/3420218813/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/release-the-mueller-report?source=e20190325_Mueller_6mo&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

subject: The 2-year, $25 million witch hunt
body:
Since Election Night 2016, Democrats and their media allies have been fixated on a simple idea. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=368566459d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **The 2-year, $25 million witch hunt **

**Since Election Night 2016,** Democrats and their media allies have been fixated on a simple illusion to justify their otherwise indefensible behavior toward an American Commander in Chief. Their illusion was that President Donald J. Trump colluded with Russia to win the 2016 election, and then obstructed justice to prevent anyone from finding out.

**On Friday** , the U.S. Department of Justice announced that Special Counsel Robert Mueller had delivered his final report to Attorney General Bill Barr. Over the weekend, Attorney General Barr presented a summary of that report to Congress.

**After an exhaustive investigation** by the Special Counsel, filled with 2,800 subpoenas, more than 500 witnesses, millions of pages of documents, and $25 million wasted in taxpayer dollars, here is what it found: nothing.

**No collusion. No obstruction.** And a complete exoneration of President Trump and the entire Trump campaign—exactly what the President and the White House have told the American people from the beginning of the Democrats’ fishing expedition.

**With that news** , the entire Democratic narrative of the past two years collapsed in an instant. Two major failures explain how the witch hunt spiraled out of Democrats’ control:

**Failure 1 was blatantly irresponsible reporting**. In an effort to validate their own political instincts, the mainstream media abandoned all journalistic standards and repeatedly failed the American people by accepting wild speculation as fact. They smeared calls for due process and common-sense skepticism as political “gaslighting,” rather than defending these basic principles of fairness and impartiality.

**Real issues** that affect Americans from coast to coast were put on the backburner as airways were flooded with false and endless “reporting” of retreaded conspiracy theories. _The New York Times_ , _The Washington Post_ , CNN, and MSNBC wrote a combined _8,507 articles_ citing Robert Mueller’s investigation since May 2017—an average of nearly 13 articles every single day.

**_The New York Times_** published 644 more stories mentioning the Mueller investigation than they did mentioning NAFTA renegotiations. _The Washington Post_ wrote 192 more stories mentioning Mueller than they did America’s defeat of the Islamic State. And CNN produced a stunning _908 more stories_ about the investigation than they did about implementation of the biggest tax reform plan in American history.

**Keep in mind** , the vast majority of that was _before_ Mueller had issued any report.

**Failure 2 was Democrat recklessness.** The left desperately tried to promote collusion conspiracies to rationalize their 2016 loss and sink Donald Trump’s presidency.

**Here’s just a small sample** of their comments—astonishing and inexcusable in light of Mueller’s report:
* **House Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff (D-CA)** stated that there was “plenty evidence of collusion”—and of a scandal “of a size and scope probably beyond Watergate.”

* **House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerry Nadler (D-NY)** said he believed there “was obviously a lot of collusion.”

* **Maxine Waters (D-CA)** said that she was _praying_ for the investigation to “connect the dots so that he can prove the collusion.”

* **DNC Chairman Tom Perez** repeatedly stated that there was a “ _mountain of evidence_ of collusion between the campaign and the Russians.”

* **Numerous House and Senate Democrats** called for President Trump’s impeachment long before the conclusion of the Special Counsel investigation.

**“I love this country** as much as I can love anything: my family, my country, my God. But what they did, it was a false narrative,” President Trump said today. “We can never let this happen to another President again.”

**There’s no spinning it:** Congressional Democrats, much of the mainstream media, and former Obama Administration officials peddled one of the greatest lies in American political history in a failed attempt to reverse the election of a President they simply don’t like.

**The real threat to our democracy** was hiding in plain sight all along.

[The statement from Press Secretary Sarah Sanders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27a31c2cfd&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [President Trump says “it’s a shame that our country had to go through this”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc1b60194c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **‘Israel has never had a better friend than you’**

**President Trump****welcomed** Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the White House this afternoon, building on America’s friendship with the Jewish State and officially recognizing Israel’s sovereignty over the Golan Heights.

**“Today** I am taking historic action to promote Israel’s ability to defend itself and really to have a very powerful, very strong national security, which they're entitled to have,” President Trump said before the signing the Proclamation today.

**Recognizing Golan Heights** as a part of the State of Israel is crucial to securing its future—especially protection from aggressive acts by Iran and terrorist groups such as Hezbollah. With today’s signing, America sends a message that any future peace agreement in the Middle East must account for Israel’s need to protect itself—no exceptions.

**“Mr. President,** over the years, Israel has been blessed to have many friends who sat in the Oval Office, but Israel has never had a better friend than you,” Prime Minister Netanyahu said today.

[President Trump’s Proclamation recognizing the Golan Heights as part of Israel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8ab3e0212&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [Prime Minister Netanyahu joins President Trump at the podium](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fea74fada4&e=3ee4985eea)
